items: Yes, the appropriate ad account was selected.
Yes, the campaign and ad set were selected as per the media document.
Yes, the Ad name was created using the Taxonomy Builder Doc (naming convention sheet).
Yes, the correct title page / Netflix handle was selected as per the AT or Campaign Detail document.
Yes, the media assets (Thumbnail and Video) were selected according to the placements mentioned in the media document.
Yes, the Primary Text, Headline, and Description were added. The default description "Only on Netflix" was included as required.
Yes, the appropriate Call-to-Action (CTA) was selected — "Learn More" for PRE and "Watch Now" for POST.
Yes, the Destination link (ODP) was added and tested to ensure it redirects correctly.
Yes, the ad was saved successfully for publishing.
Yes, the ad is currently OFF (not enabled) after trafficking.
Yes, a Calendar invite was sent with the enablement schedule for the ads, ad sets, and campaign based on the flight dates.
Yes, preview links were added in the PST/Campaign Details document and the requester has been informed accordingly.

Yes, the asset has been reviewed in line with the checklist, covering: Price messaging, Rating bugs, Audio/video sync, Subtitles, Glitches and bugs, Mid cards, Translations, Launch dates, CTAs, File size, IAAS, Technical specifications, Black screens, End cards

Yes, the appropriate ad account was selected.
Yes, the campaign and ad set were selected as per the media document.
Yes, the Creative and Media option was clicked.
Yes, the media was uploaded using the Upload Media button on the top right.
Yes, the copy was added from the PST tool.
Yes, the thumbnail was changed using the Edit Media option.
Yes, the appropriate Call to Action was selected — "Learn More" for PRE and "Watch Now" for POST.
Yes, the Allow playback in embedded posts option was checked.
Yes, the Promoted only option was selected.
Yes, the Post option was clicked to Tweet.
Yes, the campaign and ad set were checked again as per the media document.
Yes, the Edit Ad Group option was selected.
Yes, the top left thread was clicked and a placeholder or already published ad was selected.
Yes, the Create Another Ad option was clicked on the top right corner.
Yes, the Use Existing Ad option was selected and the uploaded post was chosen.
Yes, the Ad name was created using the Taxonomy Builder Doc (naming convention sheet).
Yes, the Next button was clicked to publish the ad.
Yes, a Calendar invite was sent to enable ads, ad sets, and campaign as per the flight dates.
Yes, preview links were added in the PST/Campaign Details document and the requester was informed.

Yes, the asset was reviewed according to the checklist, Price Messaging, rating bugs, covering audio/video sync, subtitles, glitches, bugs, mid cards, translations, launch dates, CTAs, file size, IAAS, technical specs, black screens, end cards.
Yes, in-burnt subtitles were checked to ensure no overlap with visuals and correct language for the channel.
Yes, the title and description were prepared with proper terminologies, NTV, MMT, text treatments, NOC and channel-specific language requirements.
Yes, the thumbnail was taken from PST/Socialite and verified Clean image, image quality, resolution, and asset size.
Yes, if the Official Trailer 16x9 Clean thumbnail has been used.
Yes, the final YouTube copy was added according to the YouTube Copy Text Optimizer.
Yes, the assets are pushed to the correct NPT Campaign.
Yes, the posts are made Unlisted ASAP.
Yes, the YT Unlisted links are added to PST/Socialite.
Yes, the necessary details are updated in the PST/Socialite.
Yes, final communications were sent via Slack where needed.
Yes, the details are added to Global QC Base.
Yes, all the posts are sent to QC by Informing in the Slack
Yes, the handoff has been shared to QM.
